name: Copper
strategic: Power, interconnect, transformers, and cooling all amplify copper sensitivity.

name: Silicon wafers
strategic: Advanced node output is foundry-constrained with long qualification cycles.

name: HBM memory
strategic: HBM bandwidth governs frontier model training throughput.

name: Lithium
strategic: Battery cost stack and storage economics remain lithium-sensitive.

name: Graphite
strategic: Anode supply is concentrated and processing intensive.

name: Rare earth magnets
strategic: Motor and precision actuator performance ties to rare-earth magnet access.

name: Power semiconductors
strategic: Conversion efficiency and high-density power delivery need robust SiC/IGBT supply.
